cookies.cookies_are_small_text: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to the website owners.
cookies.instead_we_use_the: . Instead, we use the browser's localStorage API for storing your data. This is a more modern and secure approach.
cookies.smart_grade_does_not: SMART GRADE does NOT use traditional browser cookies
cookies.smart_grade_does_not_2: SMART GRADE does not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or any third-party cookies that follow you across websites.
cookies.smart_grade_uses_localstorag: SMART GRADE uses localStorage instead of traditional cookies. localStorage is a web storage mechanism that allows websites to store data directly in your browser. Here's what we store:
cookies.smart_grade_uses_the: SMART GRADE uses the following storage mechanisms:
cookies.stores_all_your_application: Stores all your application data permanently until you delete it or clear your browser data.
cookies.temporarily_stores_transfer: Temporarily stores transfer codes (expire after 10 minutes).
cookies.we_do_not_use: We do not use HTTP cookies for tracking or advertising.
cookies.we_do_not_use_2: We do not use analytics cookies, marketing cookies, or any form of cross-site tracking.
cookies.localstorage_is_not_sent: localStorage is not sent to servers with every request
cookies.up_to_10mb_per: Up to 10MB per domain (vs 4KB for cookies)
cookies.cannot_be_read_by: Cannot be read by third parties
cookies.smart_grade_uses_the_2: SMART GRADE uses the following third-party services that may set their own storage:
cookies.used_for_cloud_transfer: Used for cloud transfer (optional). May set its own authentication cookies.
cookies.used_for_displaying_custom: Used for displaying custom fonts. May collect IP addresses.
cookies.used_for_icons_may: Used for icons. May set cookies for CDN optimization.
cookies.these_services_are_used: These services are used only when you explicitly use the corresponding features (cloud transfer, etc.).
cookies.you_have_full_control: You have full control over your data stored by SMART GRADE:
cookies.you_can_delete_all: You can delete all your data by deleting your account or clearing browser storage.
cookies.use_the_export_feature: Use the Export feature to save a backup before clearing.
cookies.you_can_choose_not: You can choose not to use cloud transfer/backup features.
cookies.most_browsers_allow_you: Most browsers allow you to clear localStorage through privacy settings.
cookies.before_clearing_your_browser: Before clearing your browser data, use the Export feature to save a backup of your grades and achievements.
cookies.different_types_of_data: Different types of data have different retention periods:
cookies.until_account_deletion_or: Until account deletion or manual clearing
cookies.we_may_update_this: We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time. When we make changes:
cookies.the_last_updated_date: The "Last updated" date at the top of this document will be modified
cookies.users_will_be_notified: Users will be notified via in-app notification of significant changes
cookies.continued_use_of_smart: Continued use of SMART GRADE after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy
cookies.if_you_have_any: If you have any questions about this Cookies Policy, please contact the developer:
cookies.smart_grade_uses_localstorag_2: SMART GRADE uses localStorage to store your grades and preferences. No tracking cookies are used. By using this application, you consent to this local storage.

doc.complete_technical_reference: Complete technical reference for SMART GRADE v5.0
doc.smart_grade_is_a: SMART GRADE is a Progressive Web Application (PWA) for grade management, designed for SIN GBHS FOUMBAN Form 5B Science. The application works 100% offline after first installation and stores all data locally on the user's device.
doc.14_subjects_6_sequences: 14 subjects, 6 sequences, 3 terms, 23 badges, 20 themes, 12 fonts, biometric login, QR code transfer, cloud backup, PWA offline support.
doc.all_data_stays_on: All data stays on the user's device. No external servers store personal data unless the user explicitly uses cloud backup.
doc.semantic_markup_localstorage: Semantic markup, localStorage API, Canvas API, MediaDevices API, Notification API, Vibration API, Clipboard API
doc.flexbox_grid_layout_css: Flexbox, Grid Layout, CSS Animations, CSS Variables (Custom Properties), Glassmorphism (backdrop-filter), Media Queries, 20 Color Themes
doc.promises_asyncawait_localsto: Promises, Async/Await, localStorage Database Management, Chart.js Integration, WebAuthn API, Service Worker (PWA)
doc.github_gist_api_cloud: GitHub Gist API (cloud transfer), QR Code generation, Chart.js for graphs, Google Fonts, Font Awesome icons
doc.the_application_follows_a: The application follows a modular architecture with separate JavaScript files for different concerns:
doc.all_localstorage_operations: - All localStorage operations (CRUD for students, grades, subjects)
doc.cloud_and_qr_code: - Cloud and QR code data transfer
doc.all_data_is_stored: All data is stored using localStorage with specific key patterns. Maximum storage is ~5-10MB per domain.
doc.getcurrentstudent_returns_cu:
getCurrentStudent()        // Returns current logged in student object
getAllStudents()           // Returns array of all students
getStudentById(id)         // Returns student by ID
createStudentAccount(name, number, className, pin)  // Creates new account
deleteStudent(id)          // Deletes student and all associated data
doc.getstudentgradesid_returns_a:
getStudentGrades(id)                    // Returns all grades for a student
saveStudentGrades(id, grades)           // Saves grades array
calculateStudentTermAverage(id, term)   // Returns term average (0-20)
calculateYearlyAverage(id)              // Returns yearly average (0-20)
calculateSubjectTermAverage(subjectId, term, grades)  // Subject average
getGradeLetter(avg)                     // Returns A+, A, B+, B, C, D, F
getStatusText(avg)                      // Excellent, Very Good, Good, etc.
doc.getstudentselectedsubjectsid:
getStudentSelectedSubjects(id, term)        // Returns selected subject IDs
saveStudentSelectedSubjects(id, term, subjects)  // Saves subject selection
getSubjectCoefficients(id)                  // Returns coefficients object
getSubjectCoefficient(id, subjectId)        // Returns coefficient for subject
getActiveSubjectsWithCoefficients(id, term) // Returns subjects with coeffs
doc.getstudentachievementsid_ret:
getStudentAchievements(id)     // Returns achievements array
unlockBadgeById(id, badgeId)   // Unlocks specific badge
updateStreakOnVisit(id)        // Updates daily streak
getStudentStreak(id)           // Returns streak object {days, lastLogin}
checkAndUnlockAllNewBadges(id) // Checks and unlocks all available badges
doc.getprofileid_returns_avatarb:
getProfile(id)                 // Returns {avatarBase64, bio, favorites}
saveProfile(id, profile)       // Saves profile data
getSavedTheme()                // Returns current theme name
saveTheme(theme)               // Saves theme preference
getSavedFontSize()             // Returns 'small', 'medium', or 'large'
doc.the_authentication_system_su: The authentication system supports both PIN (4-digit) and fingerprint (WebAuthn) login methods.
doc.fingerprint_uses_webauthn_ap: Fingerprint uses WebAuthn API and requires HTTPS or localhost. Not all browsers support this feature.
doc.the_application_supports_14: The application supports 14 subjects, each with customizable coefficients (1-10).
doc.var_defaultsubjects_id_1:
var DEFAULT_SUBJECTS = [
  { id: 1, name: "COMPUTER SCIENCES", icon: "fa-laptop-code" },
  { id: 2, name: "MATHEMATICS", icon: "fa-square-root-variable" },
  { id: 3, name: "CHEMISTRY", icon: "fa-flask" },
  { id: 4, name: "HUMAN BIOLOGY", icon: "fa-dna" },
  { id: 5, name: "GEOLOGY", icon: "fa-mountain" },
  { id: 6, name: "PHYSICS", icon: "fa-atom" },
  { id: 7, name: "ADDITIONAL MATHEMATICS", icon: "fa-calculator" },
  { id: 8, name: "BIOLOGY", icon: "fa-leaf" },
  { id: 9, name: "ECONOMICS", icon: "fa-chart-line" },
  { id: 10, name: "ENGLISH LANGUAGE", icon: "fa-language" },
  { id: 11, name: "GEOGRAPHY", icon: "fa-earth-africa" },
  { id: 12, name: "CITIZENSHIP", icon: "fa-landmark" },
  { id: 13, name: "FRENCH", icon: "fa-flag" },
  { id: 14, name: "FOOD AND NUTRITION", icon: "fa-apple-whole" }
];
doc.the_application_has_23: The application has 23 badges (14 achievement badges + 4 streak badges + 5 special badges).
doc.use_the_app_for: - Use the app for 3 consecutive days
doc.use_the_app_for_2: - Use the app for 7 consecutive days
doc.use_the_app_for_3: - Use the app for 15 consecutive days
doc.use_the_app_for_4: - Use the app for 30 consecutive days
doc.activates_automatically_betw: Activates automatically between 20:00 and 06:00. Manual override available via theme button.
doc.the_application_is_a: The application is a fully functional PWA that works offline after first installation.
doc.the_service_worker_caches: The Service Worker caches all HTML, CSS, JS, and assets. The app works 100% offline after the first successful load.
doc.the_cloud_transfer_system: The cloud transfer system uses GitHub Gist API (free, unlimited) to store temporary transfer data.
doc.transfer_codes_expire_after: Transfer codes expire after 10 minutes for security. QR codes are also valid for 10 minutes.
doc.the_application_supports_mul: The application supports multiple export formats: JSON (complete backup), CSV (spreadsheet), HTML (bulletin), PDF (report).
doc.the_json_backup_includes: The JSON backup includes all user data: grades, subjects, coefficients, achievements, streak, profile, flashcards, and history.
doc.improve_by_1_point: - Improve by 1+ point in a term
doc.add_grades_in_all: - Add grades in all subjects of a term
doc.go_from_1020_to: - Go from <10/20 to >14/20 in any subject
doc.smart_grade_includes_an: SMART GRADE includes an AI Assistant powered by Groq and Mistral models to help students with homework, explanations, and problem-solving.
doc.write_mathematical_equations: Write mathematical equations using $...$ or $$...$$ syntax
doc.supports_javascript_python_b: Supports JavaScript, Python, Bash, JSON, HTML, CSS, and more
doc.generate_flowcharts_sequence: Generate flowcharts, sequence diagrams, and more using ```mermaid syntax
doc.if_one_model_fails: If one model fails, the system automatically switches to another
doc.open_the_ai_assistant: Open the AI Assistant page from the sidebar
doc.choose_a_model_groq: Choose a model (Groq, Devstral, or Codestral)
doc.type_your_question_in: Type your question in the chat input
doc.press_ctrlenter_or_click: Press Ctrl+Enter or click the send button
doc.the_ai_will_respond: The AI will respond with formatted text, code, or diagrams
doc.use_the_ai_assistant: Use the AI Assistant for homework help, concept explanations, and problem-solving in any subject.
doc.the_transfer_system_allows: The transfer system allows users to move their data between devices using three different methods.
doc.generate_a_6character_code: Generate a 6-character code valid for 10 minutes. Data is stored locally on the device.
doc.upload_data_to_github: Upload data to GitHub Gist. Generates a 6-character code valid for 10 minutes.
doc.generate_a_qr_code: Generate a QR code containing the transfer data. Scan with the destination device.
doc.go_to_transfer_page: Go to Transfer page > Choose method > Generate code/QR
doc.go_to_transfer_page_2: Go to Transfer page > Choose method > Enter code or scan QR
doc.all_codes_expire_after: All codes expire after 10 minutes for security
doc.data_is_automatically_delete: Data is automatically deleted after import
doc.transfer_codes_are_valid: Transfer codes are valid for 10 minutes only. QR codes also expire after 10 minutes.
doc.the_homework_manager_allows: The Homework Manager allows teachers to create and manage assignments, and students to view them.
doc.teachers_can_create_assignme: Teachers can create assignments with title, subject, due date, and description
doc.support_for_images_videos: Support for images, videos, audio, PDFs, Word documents, and text files
doc.all_homework_data_is: All homework data is stored and synced via GitHub Gist
doc.students_can_filter_homework: Students can filter homework by subject
doc.teachers_can_edit_or: Teachers can edit or delete assignments
doc.teachers_access_the_admin: Teachers access the admin panel via
doc.admin_password_is_required: Admin password is required for security
doc.click_on_any_homework: Click on any homework card to see full details
doc.the_homework_manager_uses: The Homework Manager uses GitHub Gist for cloud storage. All data is synced automatically.

By installing, accessing, or using SMART GRADE, you agree to be bound by the terms of this EULA. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the Software.
eula.this_eula_applies_exclusivel: This EULA applies exclusively to students of SIN GBHS FOUMBAN, Form 5B Science, academic year 2026-2027.
eula.the_developer_grants_you: The Developer grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use SMART GRADE for personal, educational purposes at SIN GBHS FOUMBAN. This license is valid for the academic year 2026-2027.

eula.cloud_services_github_gist: Cloud services (GitHub Gist) will always be available
eula.grade_calculations_are_for: Grade calculations are for informational purposes only. The official grades from SIN GBHS FOUMBAN take precedence over any calculations in this Software.

eula.the_developers_total_liabili: The Developer's total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the Software (if any). As the Software is provided free of charge, liability is limited to zero.

eula.cease_all_use_of: Cease all use of the Software

notebook.write_down_your_ideas: Write down your ideas, notes, and reminders

privacy.smart_grade_collects_only: SMART GRADE collects only the information necessary for the application to function properly. All data is stored locally on your device unless you explicitly use cloud backup features.
privacy.name_class_student_number: Name, class, student number, and PIN
privacy.we_do_not_collect: We do NOT collect email addresses, phone numbers, physical addresses, or any form of contact information unless voluntarily provided by you.
privacy.your_information_is_used: Your information is used exclusively for:
privacy.we_do_not_sell: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.by_default_all_your: By default, all your data is stored locally on your device using the browser's localStorage technology.
privacy.your_data_never_leaves: Your data never leaves your device unless you explicitly use cloud features
privacy.you_have_full_control: You have full control over your data
privacy.no_external_servers_have: No external servers have access to your information
privacy.when_you_use_this: When you use this feature, your encrypted data is stored on JSONBin.io or GitHub Gist servers.
privacy.temporary_storage_on_github: Temporary storage on GitHub Gist (expires after 10 minutes).
privacy.you_can_export_delete: You can export, delete, or backup your data at any time from the Settings page.
privacy.we_implement_several_securit: We implement several security measures to protect your information:
privacy.your_account_is_protected: Your account is protected by a 4-digit PIN
privacy.data_never_leaves_your: Data never leaves your device by default
privacy.expired_transfer_codes_are: Expired transfer codes are automatically deleted
privacy.you_can_permanently_delete: You can permanently delete all your data
privacy.however_no_method_of: However, no method of electronic storage is 100% secure. We recommend:
privacy.using_a_strong_pin: Using a strong PIN (not sequential numbers like 1234)
privacy.as_a_user_of: As a user of SMART GRADE, you have the following rights regarding your data:
privacy.view_all_your_stored: View all your stored data at any time
privacy.download_your_data_in: Download your data in JSON, CSV, HTML, or PDF format
privacy.delete_your_account_and: Delete your account and all associated data
privacy.stop_using_cloud_features: Stop using cloud features at any time
privacy.transfer_your_data_to: Transfer your data to another device
privacy.we_retain_your_data: We retain your data for as long as you maintain an account. Specifically:
privacy.all_data_is_kept: All data is kept until you delete your account
privacy.deleted_after_24_hours: Deleted after 24 hours or when you delete them
privacy.all_data_is_permanently: All data is permanently removed from your device
privacy.before_deleting_your_account: Before deleting your account, use the Export feature to save a backup of your data.
privacy.smart_grade_does_not: SMART GRADE does not use traditional cookies. Instead, we use the browser's localStorage API to store your data:
privacy.a_web_storage_mechanism: A web storage mechanism that allows websites to store data locally on your device.
privacy.no_localstorage_is_different: No, localStorage is different from cookies and cannot be accessed by third parties.
privacy.yes_you_can_clear: Yes, you can clear localStorage through your browser settings or by deleting your account.
privacy.until_you_manually_delete: Until you manually delete it or clear your browser data.
privacy.no_tracking_cookies_analytic: No tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or advertising cookies are used in SMART GRADE.
privacy.smart_grade_uses_the: SMART GRADE uses the following third-party services (all optional):
privacy.used_for_cloud_transfer: Used for cloud transfer (optional). Your data is stored temporarily (10 minutes).
privacy.used_for_displaying_statisti: Used for displaying statistics charts. No data is sent to Chart.js servers.
privacy.used_for_generating_and: Used for generating and scanning QR codes. All processing is local.
privacy.used_for_icons_no: Used for icons. No personal data is collected.
privacy.these_services_are_used: These services are used only when you explicitly activate the corresponding features (cloud transfer, etc.).
privacy.smart_grade_is_designed: SMART GRADE is designed for students typically aged 14-18 (Form 5B Science). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.
privacy.if_you_have_concerns: If you have concerns about your child's data, please email hanskepper52@gmail.com.
privacy.we_may_update_this: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make changes:
privacy.we_encourage_you_to: We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.
privacy.if_you_have_any: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or your data, please contact the developer:
privacy.we_typically_respond_to: We typically respond to privacy-related inquiries within 48 hours.

profile.tap_camera_to_add: Tap camera to add photo | Tap photo to zoom | Max 5MB
profile.click_on_any_bio: Click on any bio to use it

search.enter_a_search_term: Enter a search term to begin
search.powered_by_15_sources: Powered by 15 sources: DuckDuckGo · Wikipedia · Wiktionary · OpenLibrary · WikiMedia · Wikidata · Google Books · Internet Archive · Jisho · TheAudioDB · OMDb · NewsAPI · YouTube · Reddit · GitHub

settings.check_if_a_new: Check if a new version of SMART GRADE is available on GitHub.
settings.name: Name
settings.click_add_fingerprint_then: Click "Add Fingerprint", then follow your browser's instructions to create a passkey. After setup, you can login with your fingerprint.
settings.export_your_data_as: Export your data as a JSON file or import a previously saved backup.

shortcuts.fast_access_to_your: Fast access to your most used features

support.we_are_here_to: We are here to help you with any questions or issues
support.choose_how_you_want: Choose how you want to send your message
support.how_do_i_recover: How do I recover my PIN?
support.for_security_reasons_pins: For security reasons, PINs cannot be recovered. Your PIN is stored encrypted locally on your device. If you forget your PIN:
support.you_will_need_to: You will need to create a new account
support.you_can_restore_your: You can restore your data from a backup if you have one
support.we_strongly_recommend_saving: We strongly recommend saving your PIN in a secure place
support.write_down_your_pin: Write down your PIN somewhere safe or use a password manager!
support.make_sure_your_device: Make sure your device has fingerprint hardware
support.you_must_first_register: You must first register your fingerprint in Settings
support.check_that_you_have: Check that you have granted fingerprint permission to your browser
support.try_reregistering_your_finge: Try re-registering your fingerprint in Settings
support.use_pin_login_as: Use PIN login as an alternative
support.fingerprint_works_best_on: Fingerprint works best on Chrome and Edge browsers on Android.
support.yes_you_can_create: Yes, you can create multiple accounts on the same device. Each student needs their own unique number within their class. The Home page displays all accounts for easy selection.
support.how_do_i_transfer: How do I transfer my data between devices?
support.generate_a_cloud_code: Generate a cloud code, enter it on the other device
support.generate_a_qr_code: Generate a QR code on source device, scan it on the destination
support.export_as_json_file: Export as JSON file, transfer via USB/cloud
support.cloud_transfer_works_between: Cloud Transfer works between Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge!
support.grades_are_automatically_sav: Grades are automatically saved every 30 seconds
support.all_backups_are_stored: All backups are stored locally and can be exported as JSON files
support.clear_your_browser_cache: Clear your browser cache and reload the page
support.try_reopening_the_app: Try reopening the app from home screen
support.check_if_you_have: Check if you have internet connection (first load requires internet)
support.update_your_browser_to: Update your browser to the latest version
support.if_problem_persists_try: If problem persists, try reinstalling the PWA
support.check_if_localstorage_is: Check if localStorage is enabled in your browser
support.make_sure_you_have: Make sure you have enough storage space on your device
support.clear_some_space_if: Clear some space if localStorage is full (usually 5-10MB limit)
support.try_exporting_your_data: Try exporting your data as backup before clearing
support.use_the_export_json: Use the "Export JSON" feature to save your data
support.you_can_check_storage: You can check storage usage in Developer Tools > Application > Storage.
support.make_sure_youre_in: Make sure you're in a well-lit environment
support.hold_the_phone_steady: Hold the phone steady about 15-20cm from the QR code
support.try_using_the_alternative: Try using the alternative code entry method
support.check_that_the_qr: Check that the QR code hasn't expired (10 minute validity)
support.how_to_change_theme: How to change theme or font?
support.in_the_top_right: in the top right corner. A bottom sheet will show:
support.use_the_app_for: Use the app for 3, 7, 15, 30 consecutive days
support.first_grade_perfect_score: First Grade, Perfect Score, High Average, etc.
support.theme_collector_font_collect: Theme Collector, Font Collector, Photo Uploader
support.check_achievements_page_to: Check Achievements page to see your progress!
support.how_do_i_set: How do I set a goal?
support.on_the_dashboard_use: On the Dashboard, use the Goal slider to set your target yearly average
support.in_goals_page_you: In Goals page, you can set subject-specific targets using sliders
support.a_progress_bar_shows: A progress bar shows how close you are to your target
support.you_get_a_notification: You get a notification when you achieve your goal!
support.flashcards_help_you_study: Flashcards help you study and memorize information:
support.each_subject_has_default: Each subject has default flashcards (3-5 cards)
support.you_can_add_your: You can add your own custom flashcards
support.tap_the_card_to: Tap the card to flip between question and answer
support.navigate_between_cards_with: Navigate between cards with Prev/Next buttons
support.unlock_badges_by_creating: Unlock badges by creating 5 and 10 custom flashcards
support.how_do_i_install: How do I install the app?
support.tap_the_menu_button: Tap the menu button (3 dots) at top right
support.select_add_to_home: Select "Add to Home Screen" or "Install App"
support.tap_install_to_add: Tap Install to add SMART GRADE to your home screen
support.tap_the_share_button: Tap the Share button at bottom
support.scroll_down_and_tap: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
support.once_installed_the_app: Once installed, the app works 100% offline!
support.yes_smart_grade_is: Yes! SMART GRADE is a Progressive Web App (PWA) that works 100% offline after first installation:
support.all_your_data_is: All your data is stored locally on your device
support.you_can_add_grades: You can add grades, view statistics, and use flashcards without internet
support.only_cloud_backup_and: Only cloud backup and update checking require internet
support.the_app_will_automatically: The app will automatically sync when you're back online
support.go_to_settings_subjects: Go to Settings → Subjects by Term
support.if_data_is_corrupted: If data is corrupted, restore a backup

terms.by_accessing_and_using: By accessing and using SMART GRADE ("the Application"), developed for SIN GBHS FOUMBAN Form 5B Science, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. These Terms of Use constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("Student", "User", "You") and the developer HANS KEPPER. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Application.
terms.this_application_is_intended: This application is intended exclusively for students of SIN GBHS FOUMBAN, Form 5B Science, academic year 2026-2027.
terms.to_use_smart_grade: To use SMART GRADE, you must create a student account with accurate information. You are solely responsible for:
terms.keeping_your_4digit_pin: Keeping your 4-digit PIN confidential and secure at all times
terms.all_activities_that_occur: All activities that occur under your account
terms.notifying_the_developer_imme: Notifying the developer immediately of any unauthorized use
terms.each_student_may_create: Each student may create only ONE account. Duplicate accounts may be subject to termination.
terms.as_a_user_of: As a user of SMART GRADE at SIN GBHS FOUMBAN, you agree to:
terms.not_share_your_account: Not share your account credentials with other students
terms.use_the_application_only: Use the application only for academic purposes
terms.use_the_application_responsi: Use the application responsibly during school hours
terms.not_manipulate_or_falsify: Not manipulate or falsify grade data
terms.any_attempt_to_falsify: Any attempt to falsify grades or manipulate the system may result in disciplinary action by the school administration.
terms.all_your_data_grades: All your data (grades, subjects, achievements, profile information, flashcards, etc.) is stored locally on your device using localStorage technology. SMART GRADE does NOT store your data on external servers unless you explicitly use the cloud backup feature (JSONBin.io) or GitHub Gist transfer feature.
terms.export_your_data_at: Export your data at any time (JSON, CSV, HTML, PDF formats)
terms.delete_your_account_and: Delete your account and all associated data permanently
terms.create_local_or_cloud: Create local or cloud backups of your data
terms.access_and_review_all: Access and review all your stored information
terms.smart_grade_is_designed: SMART GRADE is designed to help you track your academic performance. You agree to:
terms.enter_only_genuine_grades: Enter only genuine grades received from teachers
terms.not_use_the_application: Not use the application to cheat or misrepresent your academic standing
terms.understand_that_grade_calcul: Understand that grade calculations are for informational purposes only
terms.report_any_bugs_or: Report any bugs or inaccuracies to the developer
terms.modify_reverse_engineer_deco: Modify, reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the Application
terms.use_the_application_for: Use the Application for any illegal purpose under Cameroonian law
terms.attempt_to_gain_unauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' accounts
terms.interfere_with_or_disrupt: Interfere with or disrupt the operation of the Application
terms.copy_or_distribute_the: Copy or distribute the Application without permission
terms.you_may_delete_your: You may delete your account at any time from the Settings page. Account deletion is:
terms.all_data_will_be: - All data will be erased and cannot be recovered
terms.we_strongly_recommend_export: - We strongly recommend exporting your data before deletion
terms.before_deleting_your_account: Before deleting your account, go to Settings > JSON Backup > Export JSON to save a copy of your data.
terms.we_reserve_the_right: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Application at any time, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Use or is harmful to other users. Grounds for termination include:
terms.violation_of_any_term: Violation of any term of this agreement
terms.smart_grade_is_provided: SMART GRADE is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without any warranties, expressed or implied. We do not guarantee that:
terms.the_application_will_be: The Application will be error-free or uninterrupted
terms.the_application_will_meet: The Application will meet your specific requirements
terms.grade_calculations_are_for: Grade calculations are for informational purposes only. The official grades from SIN GBHS FOUMBAN take precedence over any calculations in this application.
terms.to_the_maximum_extent: To the maximum extent permitted by law, in no event shall the developer, HANS KEPPER, be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or relating to:
terms.your_use_or_inability: Your use or inability to use the Application
terms.we_reserve_the_right_2: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. When we make changes, we will:
terms.update_the_last_updated: Update the "Last updated" date at the top of this document
terms.notify_users_via_inapp: Notify users via in-app notification of significant changes
terms.require_acceptance_of_new: Require acceptance of new terms for continued use
terms.your_continued_use_of: Your continued use of SMART GRADE after any changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms of Use.
terms.these_terms_of_use: These Terms of Use shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Cameroon, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved in the courts of Foumban, West Region, Cameroon.
terms.if_you_have_any: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact the developer:
